title: Brazilians Revive a World Cup Ritual to Cheer on Their National Team
summary_full: After years of dampened enthusiasm about the World Cup, Brazilians are excited about their national team again — and they’re showing it by painting the streets.
summary_public: After years of dampened enthusiasm about the World Cup, Brazilians are excited about their national team again — and they’re showing it by painting the streets.
